text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a day out...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna head back now.
choice_data_list: Already?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? There something you wanted to do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's not it, but I'm taken aback by her coldness
toward me despite having spent the whole day
together.
choice_data_list: Did you not have a good time today?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? It was fine.
choice_data_list: I wanted you to have fun...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, ease off already. That's for me to decide.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not I have fun is none of your
business.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We done? I wanna go home already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
A new weapon comes out today. I gotta check it out
ASAP.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I can't force her to have fun, but I
really want her to feel glad that she came out
today.
choice_data_list: Then I'll just bring the fun to you!
Then I'll just bring the fun to you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I have absolutely no idea what you're
talking about.
choice_data_list: I want to see you smile.
I want to see you smile.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expect her to leave after insulting me, but she
doesn't. It seems like she's waiting for my next
move.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she likes gaming, maybe I should suggest
some kind of game we can play. That would surely
keep her entertained!
choice_data_list: Let's play the rhyme game!
Let's play tag!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What am I, a child? No way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why did I even stay? I should've just left...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was a total flop. She looks beyond
unimpressed, but I can't let this chance slip away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Rhyme!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously playing by yourself? Do you
have any shame at all?
choice_data_list: Shame, shame... Fame!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I struggle to keep the game going by myself while
she pointedly ignores me.
choice_data_list: Mustard!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously, will you knock it off already?

text_block_list.name: Baker
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! We've got some freshly baked pastries
and desserts of all kinds! Come and take a
look! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, they even have custard...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ack! N-no, I didn't mean to say that!
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't playing your stupid game! I was just
looking at the custard pastry!
choice_data_list:
Ohhh! I said "mustard" and you followed up with
"custard"!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you telling me you didn't even notice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Arrgh! Me and my big mouth!
choice_data_list: So you do want to play!
So you do want to play!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't, and I wasn't playing with you! Ugh, wipe that dumb smile off your face!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You really think you're a match for me?
choice_data_list: I might be able to catch you if I try really hard?
I might be able to catch you if I try really hard?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why would you suggest a battle you can't win?
You could've said literally any other game.
choice_data_list: I wanted to play something you would enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You make it sound like I'm some hyperactive
kid...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. You asked for it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, see ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I have to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately for me, Umamusume are fast even
when they're not trying. No matter how hard I run,
there's no way I can catch her...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Still no sign of my dumb trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Psh... There's no way a regular person could stand
a chance against me. How'd I get stuck with the
world's stupidest trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And what was that whole thing about wanting to
see me smile? What a weirdo.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I probably should have waited instead of
sprinting off so fast...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What am I even saying? This is ridiculous.
